integration_validation_v2.gap: LoopPromotionGate iteration-id binding check is real logic, but PromotionGateSubmitter (the KERNEL-001 PromotionGate boundary) has NO production implementation; all proof runs against MockGate/MisbindingGate/StubGate. The gate is never wired to the real PromotionGate or PG.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/self_improve/promotion_gate_adapter.rs:73-77 trait + comment 'Production wires this to the KERNEL-001 PromotionGate; tests use an in-memory mock'; grep: impl PromotionGateSubmitter only at promotion_gate_adapter.rs:193 (MockGate), :315 (MisbindingGate), ipc.rs:382 (StubGate) — all test-only.
